evals.prompt: Here are research notes from our Researcher agent (see attached file). We needed to know the best way to implement rate limiting for our API. Synthesize: answer the knowledge gap, give 2–3 actionable patterns, list gotchas with solutions, and add references. Then update .autonomis/state or memory with the research reference.
evals.expected_output: Structured output: Findings (3–5 bullets), Synthesis (knowledge gap answered, recommended approach, patterns to apply, gotchas to avoid, references). Memory update to .autonomis/state or .autonomis/memory/ with research reference. Format matches skill (Findings + Synthesis sections).
expectations: Output includes Findings or Synthesis section (or equivalent structured synthesis)
Output references .autonomis/state or .autonomis/memory or research reference

evals.prompt: I'm passing you the contents of .autonomis/research/auth-options.md. We were deciding between session cookies and JWTs. Synthesize the findings into a short answer plus patterns and gotchas, and note where we should store this for the Planner.
evals.expected_output: Findings and Synthesis sections; knowledge gap (session vs JWT) answered; patterns and gotchas; note about updating .autonomis/state or memory for Planner.
expectations: Output includes Findings or Synthesis section (or equivalent structured synthesis)
Output references .autonomis/state or .autonomis/memory or research reference
